overview.zh: 2室复合双动跳汰机适合中小规模选矿作业，采用与大型设备相同的复合运动技术，但尺寸更紧凑，电耗更低。该设备特别适合小型矿山和实验室应用，具有安装简便、操作灵活、维护成本低等优势。
overview.en: The 2-Chamber Composite Double-Motion Jig is suitable for medium and small-scale mineral processing operations, using the same composite motion technology as larger equipment but with a more compact size and lower power consumption. This equipment is particularly suitable for small mines and laboratory applications, featuring easy installation, flexible operation, and low maintenance costs.

title.zh: 2室复合双动跳汰机技术参数

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 紧凑型设计，适用于空间有限的中小型选矿厂
低能耗运行，节约生产成本
相比大型设备，保持相同的分选效率
安装维护简便，操作灵活
特别适用于小批量精细选矿
en: Compact design suitable for space-limited small and medium-sized mineral processing plants
Low energy consumption operation, saving production costs
Maintains the same separation efficiency as larger equipment
Easy installation and maintenance, flexible operation
Especially suitable for small-batch fine mineral processing

description.zh: 适用于小型煤矿的煤炭洗选，有效去除矸石和杂质。
description.en: Suitable for coal washing in small coal mines, effectively removing gangue and impurities.

description.zh: 提供矿物分选的实验室规模解决方案，用于科研和工艺优化。
description.en: Provides laboratory-scale solutions for mineral separation, used for scientific research and process optimization.

description.zh: 适用于小规模金、锡等贵金属的重选回收，提高资源利用率。
description.en: Suitable for small-scale gravity recovery of gold, tin and other precious metals, improving resource utilization.
